column1: #mapping_set_description: LLM-generated mappings from the FIX Protocol LinkML schema to the ISDA Common Domain Model (CDM) LinkML port. Targets are largely in the Post-Trade business area covering allocations, registrations, positions, collateral, settlement, and trade-capture lifecycle.

column8: Allocation workflow states align with CDM workflow status values.
Transaction-type discriminators (new, cancel, replace) align with CDM business-event action codes.
CDM enum classifies by collateral type; FIX enum classifies by assignment purpose; partial overlap.
Collateral message usages overlap with CDM margin-type purposes.
FIX Protocol Limited is an organization in the CDM Party static-data sense.
Position-maintenance lifecycle actions correspond to CDM position-status transitions.
Registration status maps to a subset of CDM workflow-status values.
Settlement delivery-vs-payment options overlap with CDM delivery methods.
Both express trade-identifier semantics (UTI / USI scope).
TradeCaptureReport usages correspond to CDM business-event types (new, correct, cancel).
